channel.title: Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings

item.title: EF Core at scale: 5 ways to retrieve large datasets efficiently
item.description: EF Core (Entity Framework Core) is a fast ORM. However, once dataset entries increase by another 0, things start to break down. Fetching and filtering of data adds to processing time. Looking at this pitfall, I came up with a few EF Core methods that are specifically designed to work Link to article: https://blog.elmah.io/ef-core-at-scale-5-ways-to-retrieve-large-datasets-efficiently/
